source_title: Multimodal Representation Learning Conditioned on Semantic Relations (Rcml)
purpose: Canonical relation catalog for harness routing today and export to training datasets later. Not trained weights in this repo.

jsonl_contrastive.description: Many-to-many contrastive rows: relation_nl + anchor text + positive/negative keys

relations.description_nl: Identify and follow cause-effect chains rather than surface text similarity
relations.routing_hint: After lexical hit run larger_graph_expand; trace callers before edits

examples.anchor: fix regression in skill_rerank after MCP failure
examples.positive: trace import graph from grep hit to orchestrator hook via larger_graph_expand
examples.negative: search repo for unrelated skill_rerank docs by filename only

examples.anchor: fix bug root cause in imports after verifier returns SKIP
examples.positive: detect_relation_tag causality → boost graphify-brain-map; expand caller chain
examples.negative: reload full SKILL blocks matching keyword rerank

relations.description_nl: Map structural dependencies among modules, skills, or study components
relations.routing_hint: Graphify path + skill_dag_validate before parallel load

examples.anchor: refactor skill_verifier without breaking skill_rerank CLI
examples.negative: edit SKILL_meta-analysis.md only because both mention skills

examples.anchor: move handoff_log hook when orchestrator imports change
examples.positive: Graphify import edges from 00_orchestrator_agent.mdc to handoff MCP

relations.description_nl: Preserve ordered methodological assumptions before inferential steps
relations.routing_hint: Load methodology or test-selection before analysis skills

examples.anchor: meta-analysis workflow used Student t-test on skewed arms
examples.positive: test-selection → Welch t-test default → then inferential skill

examples.anchor: run Cox primary analysis on survival outcome
examples.positive: methodology SAP + cox.zph / Schoenfeld before Cox model
examples.negative: meta-analysis pooled estimate without PH check

relations.description_nl: Align claims with verifiable evidence strength labels
relations.routing_hint: research-lookup or swiss-cheese before strong wording

examples.anchor: literature search for ECMO sedation RCT evidence
examples.positive: tool_selected pubmed/search with abstract verification before claim
examples.negative: tool_selected web_search/fetch when golden_set expects pubmed/search

examples.anchor: manuscript Discussion states dexmedetomidine first-line on adult ECMO
examples.positive: research-lookup + swiss-cheese; label supported vs partial vs unsupported
examples.negative: cite title-only PubMed record without full-text check

relations.description_nl: Reuse compatible procedural subunits instead of reloading full skill blocks

examples.anchor: Write PRD product requirements after grill-me alignment
examples.positive: rank_skills --rwr reaches grill-me prerequisite; verifier ACCEPT strategy layer
examples.negative: load full ralph-loop + write-prd + prd-to-issues bodies in one turn

examples.anchor: tweak forest plot styling in meta-analysis manuscript pass
examples.positive: skill_verifier DECOMPOSE forest-plot subunit; skip unrelated SR screening steps
examples.negative: Tier-3 reload entire SKILL_meta-analysis.md each message

relations.description_nl: Align image and text regions under an explicit relational description (Rcml core)
relations.routing_hint: Training-only in v1; no harness runtime

examples.anchor: forest plot image: pooled diamond and CI whiskers region
examples.positive: caption text: random-effects pooled OR 1.12 (95% CI 0.89–1.41)
examples.negative: caption describes CONSORT flow diagram enrollment counts only

examples.anchor: methods diagram panel showing DAG skill load order
examples.positive: legend text: Policy → Strategy → Procedure before Primitive injection
examples.negative: legend lists alphabetically sorted skill filenames
